purpose: Pinned, fixture-bounded retrieval and public-method-name probe against Mem0. This does not establish universal product capability or superiority.
hashPolicy: SHA-256 over repository text bytes after CRLF and CR are normalized to LF, so attestations are stable across Git checkout platforms.

dependencies.qdrantClientVersionPolicy: Record the exact installed version. Do not compare attempts across different versions without disclosing the change.

publicMethodNameProbe.mechanism: Filter public names returned by Python dir(memory) for consist, contradict, conflict, resolve, or audit substrings.
publicMethodNameProbe.safeInterpretation: An empty match means only that this pinned object exposed no separately named public method matching those substrings. It does not prove absence of internal, undocumented, differently named, or newer-version conflict handling.

attemptPolicy.artifact: One complete, versioned JSON document published with exclusive non-overwrite semantics.
attemptPolicy.ledger: Append-only JSONL summary; the artifact remains authoritative if ledger append fails.
attemptPolicy.historicalArtifactPolicy: bench/external/mem0-evidence.json is immutable historical evidence and must never be overwritten by this protocol.

reporting: Retain every conflict pair, retrieval probe, returned memory string, method-name match, completion state and categorical failure. Do not select attempts or infer capabilities not directly inspected.
